summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RevLabs bilingual website. All core functionality working correctly including Dutch/English language toggle, contact form submission, FAQ accordion, CTA buttons, mobile responsiveness, and all website sections.
passed_tests: Contact form submission with valid data
Contact form validation with invalid data
Homepage loads with Dutch content by default
Language toggle switches between NL and EN correctly
All sections render: Hero, Problem/Solution, How it Works, Systems, Benefits, Testimonials, CTA, FAQ, Contact Form, Footer
Contact form submission to /api/contact endpoint works
CTA buttons have correct Calendly link (target=_blank)
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Industry dropdown in contact form works
5 CTA buttons found throughout the site with correct Calendly links
